'''takongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbd|mbd]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbd|mbd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| takongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tækengeth|tækengeth]] || [[word:tækengej|tækengej]] || [[word:tækengesh|tækengesh]] || [[word:tækenge|tækenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:takokongoth|takokongoth]] || [[word:takokongoj|takokongoj]] || [[word:takokongosh|takokongosh]] || [[word:takokongo|takokongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:takongoth|takongoth]] || [[word:takongoj|takongoj]] || [[word:takongosh|takongosh]] || [[word:takongo|takongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:takofngoth|takofngoth]] || [[word:takofngoj|takofngoj]] || [[word:takofngosh|takofngosh]] || [[word:takofngof|takofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:takongotho|takongotho]] || [[word:takongojo|takongojo]] || [[word:takongosho|takongosho]] || [[word:takongoko|takongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:takongoth|takongoth]] || [[word:takongoj|takongoj]] || [[word:takongosh|takongosh]] || [[word:takongo|takongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:takongothol|takongothol]] || [[word:takongojol|takongojol]] || [[word:takongoshol|takongoshol]] || [[word:takongokol|takongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:takongothotho|takongothotho]] || [[word:takongojojo|takongojojo]] || [[word:takongoshosho|takongoshosho]] || [[word:takongoko|takongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:takongothon|takongothon]] || [[word:takongojon|takongojon]] || [[word:takongoshon|takongoshon]] || [[word:takongokon|takongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:takongothoro|takongothoro]] || [[word:takongojoro|takongojoro]] || [[word:takongoshoro|takongoshoro]] || [[word:takongokoro|takongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
